target: 9th Loop
9. A Call from Me?
Shinpei Ajiro
Hah... Hah...
(Alright... arrived safely...! The time is... 10:45...!)
(About 40 minutes with three kids...!)

Alain!
I'm back!!
Hm? Oh... You've brought some tiny guests with you again...
Hah... Hah... M-Mio and the others!!?
Eh? Ah. I got a call like that from Toki-chan too...
Mio went out together with Sou. Said they were 'going to meet you'...
It was about 30 minutes ago.
Where did they say they were going!? Where!?
Well... I don't know that much...
Shinpei! What happened?
Alain! Take care of those kids!!
(Please! Mio! Sou! Answer the phone!)
The number you have dialed is either out of the service area--
...Kuh.
(Mio and the others left about 30 minutes ago...)
(On the other hand, it took us about 40 minutes coming down from the mountain with the kids...)
(It took over 30 minutes to get to Kofune...)
(I've been calling non-stop since we got signal, but I can't reach anyone!)
('Going to meet me'!? Could my shadow be here...!!)

(Why!?
I wasn't copied!)
(Getting copied at the funeral, getting copied on the 3rd floor of Koba Mart, all of that was undone--)
(...No, that's wrong!!)
...You wanna copy him too?
No…
He's already been... copied by Mother...
(The one who copied me was Haine!!!!)
(And Haine... came from the end of the summer festival in the 3rd loop...)
(The shadow of me that was copied at Koba Mart in the 3rd loop, is being used now in the 8th loop...!!)
(But how did he make a phone call!? Without being suspected!?)
(Even if he copied my phone, he couldn't use it without erasing the real one...)
Shin… chan…

(The voice just now…!
From my room?!)
...Wh-Why are ya... here...!?
Mio!?
Who on earth did this...
No way... So that call just now was...
Phew... are you okay?
Ya coulda taken 'em out more gently...
M-My bad...!!
Shin-chan, your hand... I'll give you my memories.
Mio!!? Why did you do that to Mio...!
Shin-chan told me... That Sis had died...
So, it would be dangerous if the hacking came undone...
That Mio might become an enemy again!!
That's...
The one who nailed Mio down was Mio...?
Mio got a call from Shin-chan's smartphone saying 'Sis died'... Is that true?
Yeah, but that call wasn't from me...!! My shadow tricked Mio and the others...
...I'm sorry. I wasn't able to protect Mio.
I know Shin-chan's shadow was there. I saw it in Sis's pseudo-loop.
I also heard from Shin-chan that it was born by being copied by Shiori--Haine.
Yeah... but to think that right now... There are 'two' of my phones existing in a usable state in this world...
I was careless...
I just remembered... In the 3rd loop, when I met my shadow at the shrine, he stole my real phone...
In the end, all the shadows were absorbed into Haine's body, right?
I see…
At that time, the real one was erased, and the copied phone became usable while inside Haine...
To use it at this timing... As expected of Shin-chan's shadow.
This isn't the time to be praising him...!!
Haine has read Nagumo-sensei's memories too... This is bad... Sensei's contact info is exposed too...
Where'd Mio and Sou go?
...!! An incoming call from Sensei...!!
Hello!?
…Hey, Shinpei.
(...My voice...!)
How is it? A phone call from a shadow.
You're... Haine, aren't you... Why from Sensei's phone... What did you do to Sensei!?
Come see fer yerself, Observer...
Hizuru and her group are on Torashima, Mio and her group are at Alain's field...
It's up to you. Which one you go to save.
Wa... Hey... Wait a--
Hello! Hello!?
Calm down, Shin-chan. We have to think of all possibilities...
I know…
Haine is currently thinking with your personality, Shin-chan. We're being looked down on from a bird's-eye view too.
Kuh...
(Torashima and Alain's field are in opposite directions...!)
(If I go to one, I might not be able to save the other.)
(Look at the big picture. Look at the big picture...)
(Why is Haine doing such a... roundabout thing!?)
Mio or sensei…
Both could be lies... Both of them might already be killed.
...But even so, we can't just do nothing!!
If I'm going to regret not doing something... I'd rather regret doing something...
Gather them up... Anything that could be a weapon...
All of it...!!
(I was able to return, huh...)
W-We've escaped the crisis... Is that what this means?
(Mt. Takanosu...! Right after Haine left!)
(The Strays around us... Good, they're gone.)
(It hasn't changed from the previous loop... In that case...!)
...Yeah. We've escaped the crisis... it's safe now.
But there's always the worst-case scenario. Everyone, evacuate to Kofune just like this. You can go even without me, right?
Won't you come with us?
I have something to do. It's an emergency...!
So, about Akari-chan... Take her to Kofune. ...You're her big brother, right?
...Got it! Everyone, let's go!
Yeah!!
(I feel bad for the kids, but it's faster if I hurry to Kofune alone.)
(It's not like there's no possibility of the shadows attacking again, but...)
(There's no reason for anyone other than Haine to retreat in that situation.)
(In other words... That was a retreat with some kind of reason...!)
(Then, just like last time, the possibility of them reaching Kofune safely is higher!)
(If so, the action I should prioritize is clear...!)
(I have to stop Mio and Sou no matter what before they reach Alain's field!)

Mio!
Are you okay?!
Sh-Shin-chan...!? Why are you here--
Explanations later... I'm pulling out the nails!
Sorry for being rough. But right now, I can't waste a single second.
...That phone call from earlier... Could it be Shin-chan's shadow?
Yeah... it's Haine's trap. That's why we have to stop those two who went out.
"Let's hurry via the shortest route."
"We'll go through the sewers where no one will see us."
Anyway, let's hurry!
...Understood. The shortest route is fine, right?
Yeah.
Then, grab onto my back. Also, keep your mouth closed while we're running.
I know. I can't afford to bite my tongue.
We'll go through the <color=#GF_KEY_GESUIDO>sewers</color> where we won't be seen!
Sewers…?
Hitogashima has countless underground passages. We'll head there via the shortest route while being careful of enemy presence.
As I just said, we don't have time to deal with them.
Understood.
